'''hanoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iyokan|iyokan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iyokan|iyokan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hanoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænereth|hænereth]] || [[word:hænerej|hænerej]] || [[word:hæneresh|hæneresh]] || [[word:hænere|hænere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanonoroth|hanonoroth]] || [[word:hanonoroj|hanonoroj]] || [[word:hanonorosh|hanonorosh]] || [[word:hanonoro|hanonoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanoroth|hanoroth]] || [[word:hanoroj|hanoroj]] || [[word:hanorosh|hanorosh]] || [[word:hanoro|hanoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanofroth|hanofroth]] || [[word:hanofroj|hanofroj]] || [[word:hanofrosh|hanofrosh]] || [[word:hanofrof|hanofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanorotho|hanorotho]] || [[word:hanorojo|hanorojo]] || [[word:hanorosho|hanorosho]] || [[word:hanoroko|hanoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanoroth|hanoroth]] || [[word:hanoroj|hanoroj]] || [[word:hanorosh|hanorosh]] || [[word:hanoro|hanoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanorothol|hanorothol]] || [[word:hanorojol|hanorojol]] || [[word:hanoroshol|hanoroshol]] || [[word:hanorokol|hanorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanorothotho|hanorothotho]] || [[word:hanorojojo|hanorojojo]] || [[word:hanoroshosho|hanoroshosho]] || [[word:hanoroko|hanoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanorothon|hanorothon]] || [[word:hanorojon|hanorojon]] || [[word:hanoroshon|hanoroshon]] || [[word:hanorokon|hanorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanorothoro|hanorothoro]] || [[word:hanorojoro|hanorojoro]] || [[word:hanoroshoro|hanoroshoro]] || [[word:hanorokoro|hanorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
